case_title: MARKUS SAITMACHER ET AL VS. JOHN VOTRUBA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-18-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-18-2024 BY MARGARET WU. PLAINTIFF MARKUS SAITMACHER AND SANIYA YADAV IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOHN VOTRUBA IS PRESENT.
